fato_historico: 1952: The 7.3 Mw Kern County earthquake strikes Southern California with a maximum Mercalli intensity of XI (Extreme), killing 12 and injuring hundreds.
energia_do_dia: Today, you may feel an intense shift deep within, like the earth moving to rearrange its foundations. Just as resilience emerges from stillness, consider this a time to ground your fiery spirit. It is a good time to build something lasting, perhaps turning challenges into steady strength and finding harmony amidst your grand, passionate creative pursuits.
frase_do_dia: Even the strongest ground shifts to make room for your new, vibrant growth.
significado_numero: Represents the completion of a cycle and the wisdom of experience.
conselho: Stand tall, stay centered, and trust the stability of your beautiful, bold heart.
